source_pr.title: expression, session: handle `CASE WHEN` specially when folding constant during outerJoin Simplification
source_pr.body:
<!--

-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->
fix issue:#11102 Unexcepted result in `SELECT ... CASE WHEN ... ELSE NULL...`

### What is changed and how it works?


### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test

root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR fixes a deterministic correctness issue in constant-folding for `CASE WHEN` under outer join simplification and adds regression tests. The available case data does not show an intermittent flaky signature or a nondeterminism trigger, so keep the conservative fallback classification rather than guessing a flaky root cause.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).

evidence: evidence: "order by t3.id").Check(testkit.Rows("1 <nil> case1", "2 z case1")) (session/session_test.go)
